tuning: E A D G B E

recommended.song_name: I Lay My Love On You

content:
INTRO:  [ch]Asus2[/ch] [ch]E[/ch] [ch]Esus[/ch]  [ch]D[/ch]

VERSE:

[tab]         [ch]Asus2[/ch]                         [ch]E[/ch]
 I wanna know, whoever told you I was letting go[/tab]
[tab]                             [ch]Gadd9[/ch]
 Of the only joy that I have ever known[/tab]
[tab]      [ch]Dsus2[/ch]
 Girl they were lying[/tab]

[tab]            [ch]Asus2[/ch]                                [ch]E[/ch]
 Just look around, and all of the people that we used to know, [/tab]
[tab]                               [ch]Gadd9[/ch]
 Have just given up they wanna let it go[/tab]
[tab]                 [ch]Dsus2[/ch]
 But we're still trying[/tab]

[tab]    [ch]Bm[/ch]                   [ch]F#7[/ch]/[ch]A#[/ch]

[tab]      [ch]E[/ch]       [ch]D[/ch]       [ch]D/E[/ch] [ch]E[/ch]   [ch]A[/ch]

[tab]     [ch]E[/ch]      [ch]Dsus2[/ch]

[tab]               [ch]Asus2[/ch]                          [ch]E[/ch]
 Some people say that everything has got its place and time [/tab]
